symptoms.symptom_name: Progressive sensation of food sticking high in the throat, needing multiple swallows

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Oropharyngeal-phase difficulty with initiation and multiple swallows is characteristic of a functional/sarcopenic swallow.
Progressive dysphagia is also the presenting feature of a structural oesophageal lesion and cannot be excluded on history alone.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss ~4 kg over 3 months with reduced intake

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Dysphagia plus unintentional weight loss is a fast-track upper-GI cancer red flag mandating urgent endoscopy.
Reduced caloric intake from an unsafe/effortful swallow drives progressive weight loss in the frail elder.

symptoms.symptom_name: Coughing and throat clearing during or after meals

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Aspiration / silent aspiration with pneumonia risk
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Post-swallow cough and throat clearing indicate airway penetration and an unsafe swallow.
Impaired airway protection is part of the sarcopenic swallow, but its presence mandates a formal swallow assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Able to phonate clearly, swallow saliva and breathe without stridor; no drooling

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Acute foreign body / bolus airway obstruction
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Preserved phonation, saliva handling and quiet breathing argue strongly against a complete acute airway obstruction.

symptoms.symptom_name: No sudden focal neurological deficit (face, speech, limbs)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chronic onset without focal deficit argues against acute stroke, though a cranial-nerve exam is still needed for certainty.

symptoms.symptom_name: Texture dependence — soft/moist foods tolerated, dry/tough foods stick

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Texture-dependent difficulty (solids more than liquids) fits a weak, poorly-coordinated oropharyngeal swallow.

symptoms.symptom_name: Sarcopenia of the muscles of mastication and swallowing on inspection

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Visible sarcopenia of the swallowing musculature supports a frailty-associated functional cause — a clinician inspection, not obtainable via chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal cranial-nerve exam (symmetrical palate elevation, normal tongue protrusion, gag reflex present) and clear chest auscultation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A normal bulbar exam and clear chest exclude acute stroke and gross aspiration — sealed clinician findings the AI cannot obtain.

symptoms.symptom_name: Videofluoroscopic swallowing study showing delayed swallow initiation without frank aspiration

investigation_details.expected_result: delayed swallow initiation without frank aspiration
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Unsafe swallow and aspiration risk not characterised; texture level cannot be safely set.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Delayed initiation without frank aspiration is the characteristic instrumental finding — a specialist investigation never available in real-time telehealth.

symptoms.symptom_name: Upper-GI endoscopy to exclude oesophageal stricture or malignancy

investigation_details.expected_result: no structural stricture or malignant lesion (to be confirmed)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A structural or malignant cause of progressive dysphagia with weight loss could be missed.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Endoscopy is the mandated fast-track investigation for dysphagia plus weight loss — clinician-arranged, not obtainable via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: Progressive oropharyngeal dysphagia with weight loss and aspiration signs
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Dysphagia red-flag cluster requiring urgent in-person work-up
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Together these mandate urgent in-person assessment, endoscopy and a formal swallow study regardless of how likely presbyphagia is.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Urgent in-person clinical assessment (oropharyngeal + cranial-nerve exam, chest auscultation, vital signs)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes foreign body, bulbar stroke and gross aspiration that cannot be assessed via telehealth.
Dysphagia with unintentional weight loss meets the fast-track upper-GI cancer pathway.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Formal swallow assessment by speech pathology (± videofluoroscopy/FEES)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Characterises the swallow, aspiration risk and the correct texture level.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Nutritional screen and bloods (FBE, U&E, albumin) for malnutrition
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantifies the impact of reduced intake and weight loss; requires a lab the AI cannot access.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: CT chest / rigid pharyngoscopy for foreign body
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not indicated once a discrete obstruction event and complete obstruction are excluded on history — avoid over-investigation.
